collision_resolution_records.antithesis: Nanite incompatible with masked/translucent in UE5.4
collision_resolution_records.synthesis: Use Nanite for opaque geometry; fallback rasterizer for masked foliage; monitor Epic roadmap for masked Nanite support (ETA 2026)

collision_resolution_records.thesis: BC7 is optimal for real-time texture compression
collision_resolution_records.antithesis: NTBC/Neural BC achieves 70% storage reduction with modest overhead
collision_resolution_records.synthesis: BC7 ORM remains production standard for Q1 2026; Neural BC appropriate for memory-critical XR deployments on supporting hardware (DX12 cooperative vectors)

collision_resolution_records.conflict: TAA vs TSR for WPO-heavy scenes
collision_resolution_records.antithesis: TSR has higher baseline overhead (57ms contribution) and still requires velocity output on WPO
collision_resolution_records.synthesis: TSR preferred for cinematic mode; TAA with forced velocity output preferred for gameplay; TSR dramatically reduces Lumen+Nanite internal resolution cost offsetting its base overhead
